prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2023年理科最低位次约4247名，2024年前移至约3568名（竞争加剧），2025年小幅后移至约3883名，近三年波动幅度约679名，2025年基准位次约3883名；2023-2024年本省理科计划均为53人，2025年缩减至48人（缩招约9.4%），2026年计划仍为48人，与2025年持平，未进一步扩招或缩招。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 东北 大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学主榜2026年排名第38位，近年稳定在36-39名区间，属于国内顶尖高校行列；2026年声誉评价为中性/ 混合，主要涉及秦皇岛校区命名争议，无重大负面舆情；抖音综合热度排名第82位，评价为一般，曝光量中等；2025年曾发生实习安全事故偏负面事件，但2026年已趋稳，未对报 考心理产生持续负面影响；第五轮学科评估中，控制科学与工程获评A+、计算机科学与技术获评A、软件工程获评A-、冶金工程获评A、机械工程获评A-、材料科 学与工程获评A-，共6个A-及以上学科，工科实力突出。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业在2024-2026年专业热度分析中均为高热 推荐/推荐，与东北大学优势学科高度匹配，可能吸引更多高分考生报考；新疆2026年高考总考生数约23.8万人（含不确定标记），较2025年总人数约7.65万大幅增长，理科考生 规模预计同步扩大，竞争显著加剧；东北大学位于辽宁沈阳，属跨省招生，2025年在新疆招生48人占全国总计划3581人的 约1.34%，无本地生源偏好优势，但作为东北地区头部985对西北考生仍有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次3883名、2026年招生计划持平、新疆考生总数大幅增 长带来的竞争加剧、学校声誉趋稳及优势学科对应专业热度偏高等因素，预计2026年录取位次较2025年略有后移（竞争加剧）。预测最低位次约3963名，乐观区间下限约3463名， 保守区间上限约4463名。

一档（最难进）
- 自动化类（含自动化、电气工程及其自动化等）
- 计算机科学与技术

major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）

- 经济管理试验班（工商管理、会计学、金融学等）
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间（3463-4463名）内，建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底。位次明显优于区间下限（如3500名以内）可重点冲刺自动化类和计算机科学与 技术等王牌专业；位次在区间中段（约3900-4200名）应以二档的智能制造工程、机械类等为主；位次接近区间上限（4300名以上）建议以三档专业保底，确保录取。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2023, the minimum ranking for Science was approximately 4247, moving forward to about 3568 in 2024 (increased competition), and slightly moving back to about 3883 in 2025, with a fluctuation range of about 679 over the past three years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 3883. The provincial Science enrollment plan was 53 for both 2023 and 2024, reduced to 48 in 2025 (a decrease of about 9.4%), and remains at 48 for 2026, unchanged from 2025, with no further expansion or reduction.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Northeastern University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Main Ranking, it ranks 38th, stable in the 36-39 range in recent years, belonging to the top tier of domestic universities. Its 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, mainly involving the naming controversy of the Qinhuangdao campus, with no major negative public opinion. Its comprehensive Douyin popularity ranking is 82nd, rated as average, with moderate exposure. In 2025, there was a somewhat negative incident involving internship safety, but it has stabilized by 2026, with no lasting negative impact on application psychology. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Control Science and Engineering was rated A+, Computer Science and Technology rated A, Software Engineering rated A-, Metallurgical Engineering rated A, Mechanical Engineering rated A-, and Materials Science and Engineering rated A-, totaling 6 disciplines rated A- or above, highlighting strong engineering capabilities.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation are all rated as high-heat/recommended in the 2024-2026 major popularity analysis, highly matching Northeastern University's advantageous disciplines, potentially attracting more high-scoring applicants. In 2026, the total number of Gaokao examinees in Xinjiang is about 238,000 (including uncertain markers), a significant increase from about 76,500 in 2025, with the number of Science examinees expected to expand correspondingly, leading to notably intensified competition. Northeastern University is located in Shenyang, Liaoning, and recruits across provinces. In 2025, it enrolled 48 students in Xinjiang, accounting for about 1.34% of the national total plan of 3,581, with no local student preference advantage, but as a top 985 in Northeast China, it still holds strong appeal for Northwestern candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 3883, the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, intensified competition due to the significant increase in Xinjiang examinee numbers, stabilized university reputation, and high popularity of majors corresponding to advantageous disciplines, the 2026 admission ranking is expected to slightly move back (due to intensified competition). The predicted minimum ranking is about 3963, with an optimistic lower bound of about 3463 and a conservative upper bound of about 4463.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Automation (including Automation, Electrical Engineering and Automation, etc.)
- Computer Science and Technology
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Intelligent Manufacturing Engineering
- Energy and Power Engineering
- Mechanical (including Mechanical Engineering, Vehicle Engineering, etc.)
- Engineering Experimental Class (2) (Mineral Processing Engineering, Safety Engineering, Civil Engineering, etc.)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Applied Physics
- Engineering Experimental Class (1) (Metallurgical Engineering, Environmental Science, etc.)
- Materials (Materials Science and Engineering, etc.)
- Science Experimental Class (Chemistry, Applied Chemistry)
- Economics and Management Experimental Class (Business Administration, Accounting, Finance, etc.)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking falls within the predicted range (3463-4463), it is recommended to primarily apply for Tier 2 majors, with Tier 1 as a reach and Tier 3 as a safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower bound (e.g., within 3500), focus on reaching for top majors like Automation and Computer Science and Technology. If your ranking is in the middle of the range (about 3900-4200), prioritize Tier 2 majors such as Intelligent Manufacturing Engineering and Mechanical. If your ranking is near the upper bound (above 4300), it is advisable to use Tier 3 majors as a safety to ensure admission.
